accommodations.text: Provide visual supports and models for new tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide visual supports and models for new tasks.

accommodations.text: Read test directions and math word problems aloud on request.
accommodations.source_quote: Read test directions and math word problems aloud on request.

accommodations.text: Do not grade spelling on first-draft written work.
accommodations.source_quote: Do not grade spelling on first-draft written work.

services.source_quote: Language processing support (group): 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Unassigned.

goals.text: Priya will use correct past-tense verbs in structured sentences with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Uses correct past-tense verbs with 50% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: Priya will use correct past-tense verbs in structured sentences with 80% accuracy.

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Layla will define grade-level academic vocabulary with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: Layla will define grade-level academic vocabulary with 80% accuracy.

goals.text: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Retells a narrative with only a beginning in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
